title: Company identity
text: Valliani Jewelers is a fine jewelry retailer founded in 1999 in the California Bay Area by Kash Valliani (Kashif Valliani). The brand is described as a family-owned fine jewelry retail chain and a luxury retail brand in the United States.

metadata.freshness: verify live store list and policies against official website before production use

title: Website and support contact
text: Main website: https://www.vallianijewelers.com. Customer support email: orders@vallianijewelers.com. Phone: 1-844-OVANI-104. Customers can contact Valliani for help with diamond jewelry, engagement rings, wedding bands, lab-grown diamonds, financing, store locations, and general customer support.

title: Business type and products
text: Valliani Jewelers is a fine jewelry store offering diamond jewelry, engagement rings, wedding bands, gold jewelry, gemstones, watches, necklaces, bracelets, and gifts. The company overview says it offers diamonds, gemstones, engagement rings, bridal jewelry, and luxury timepieces.

title: Service promises
text: Main service promises listed: free shipping across the US, 30-day returns for online orders only, and 24/7 support.

title: Online return policy
text: Online purchases have 30-day returns. Returns must include original packaging, certificates, documentation, and any free gifts. Missing items may prevent refund. The online return policy does not change in-store return or exchange rules.

title: Brand background
text: Valliani Jewelers focuses on timeless, accessible jewelry and has helped customers celebrate life moments for over 25 years. Stores are designed to provide a personal, comfortable shopping experience. The company is built on four pillars: Value, Vogue, Verve, and Variety.
